summary: Soundboard source shows noticeable hiss yet delivers an epic Baby Blue and a definitive Friend of Mine performance.
review: The show is praised as stunning, with Baby Blue highlighted as "EPIC" and the rendition of Friend of Mine called definitive. While the newer transfer adds more tape hiss than earlier versions, the overall musical experience remains highly enjoyable for listeners.

ai_rating.rationale: All three reviewers are enthusiastic (average 4.7★) and focus on strong performances; the only drawback is added hiss, which slightly lowers the technical score.

recording_quality.technical_notes: New transfer exhibits increased tape hiss compared to earlier versions; some note a loss of warmth but no major dropouts or distortion.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewers describe the concert as uniformly stunning and psychedelic, with high energy throughout; no specific pacing issues mentioned.
